title: SEYMAC stock Case for iPad A16 11th/10th Generation (11/10.9 Inch) 2025/2022, Heavy Duty Shockproof with Screen Protector, 360° Rotating Stand/Hand Strap, Pencil Holder & Shoulder Strap, Black
features: [Compatible Models]: Exclusively designed shockproof case for iPad (A16) 11th Generation 11 inch 2025 (Model: A3354 / A3355 / A3356) and for iPad 10th Generation 10.9 inch 2022 (Model: A2696 / A2757 / A2777). NOT fit any other model

[360° Rotating & Adjustable Stand/ Hand Strap]: The rotatable kickstand can stably support your iPad 10th/11th Generation, helping to free your hands and providing you with a more flexible & comfortable viewing/typing angle. With soft hand strap, you can hold your iPad securely with one hand and use it at any angle, convenient for meetings or travel

[Full Body Protection + Screen Protector]: This case for iPad A16 11th generation 11 inch/ 10th generation 10.9 inch is designed with anti-shock material, with hard PC frame, soft silicone skin and built-in screen protector. 3-in-1 all-round protection design to keep your iPad from scratches, shocks, or drop damages

[Practical Shoulder Strap & Pencil Holder]: The shoulder strap for iPad 11th/10th generation case is detachable and adjustable, convenient for both kids and adults to carry the tablet during hiking, traveling or other outdoor activities. Built-in pencil holder to safely store the stylus and take it at any time to avoid loss
[Customer Service]: If you encounter any problems about product use, installation or size mismatch, etc., please let us know and we will help you solve the problem within 24 hours
